This adapter runs its own MQTT broker. P: This adapter runs its own MQTT broker. Point the Lithernet Casambi gateway's MQTT client at this host and port. SSL is not supported by the gateway - use a trusted network.
The <deviceId> set in the gateway web UI: The <deviceId> set in the gateway web UI; topics are casambi/<id>/...
Number of virtual buttons to create for: Number of virtual buttons to create for injecting press/release events into Casambi (0 = none)
Write every message received from the ga: Write every message received from the gateway to the adapter log (info level). Useful for setup/diagnostics; disable in normal operation.
